title: taraxacum cambricum
intro: Taraxacum cambricum, also known as the Welsh dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Taraxacum cambricum include its ability to support liver health, reduce blood pressure, and act as a natural diuretic. Taraxacum cambricum can be consumed as an herbal preparation, such as a tea or tincture, which can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
